---
title: "Anion Trapping and Ionic Conductivity Enhancement in PEO-Based Composite Polymer–Li₇La₃Zr₂O₁₂ Electrolytes: The Role of the Garnet Li Molar Content"
author: ["Henry A. Cortés", "Mauricio R. Bonilla", "Ernesto E. Marinero", "Javier Carrasco", "Elena Akhmatskaya"]
date: 2023-05-22
publication: "Macromolecules, **56**(11), 4256-4266 (2023)."
categories: ["SSBs"]
url_source: https://pubs.acs.org/doi/full/10.1021/acs.macromol.3c00568
url_preprint:
journ: "Macromolecules"
issue: 56
page: 4256-4266
year: 2023
image: featured.png
pub_number: 10
---
